title: Fabric and lace impression coaster set
notes: Set of six round coasters (90 mm diameter, 6 mm thick) each pressed with a different textile — cotton lace, hessian burlap, fine muslin, ribbed cord, crochet fabric, rough linen. Roll the slab, cut circles, press fabric firmly into surface, peel away. The clay holds the woven texture in sharp detail. PVA sealed on all surfaces for water resistance. Felt pads added to base.
